summary: Iteration 64 - Franchise Dashboard & Meta API Integration Testing Complete. All 13 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Franchise Dashboard and Meta API integration fully verified. Super Admin login with new password (TheCoach1290.) works. Dashboard Franchise shows aggregated KPIs for 4 clubs, club comparison, monthly trends, and ad budget table. Meta API is LIVE connected to Facebook account (act_1180089966353771) with real ad spend data (1187.82 CHF for March 2026). Manager role correctly cannot see Franchise features.

super_admin_login_new_password.evidence: Login with TheCoach1290. returns role=super_admin, 4 club_ids

franchise_dashboard_endpoint.evidence: GET /api/franchise/dashboard?month=2026-03 returns totals with revenue, ad_spend, members across 4 clubs

franchise_ad_budgets_endpoint.evidence: GET /api/franchise/ad-budgets returns ad budget info per club

franchise_dashboard_manager_forbidden.evidence: Manager gets error 'Accès réservé au Super Admin'

meta_ad_spend_endpoint.evidence: GET /api/meta/ad-spend/2026/3 returns spend data from Meta API

meta_sync_endpoint.evidence: POST /api/meta/sync-ad-spend syncs Meta data to KPIs

frontend_franchise_dashboard_page.evidence: Page shows KPIs, club comparison, trends chart, ad budget table

frontend_meta_status_banner.evidence: Banner shows 'Meta Ads API : Connecté' with 'Ad Spend ce mois : 1187.82 CHF'

frontend_franchise_link_hidden_manager.evidence: Manager does not see FRANCHISE section in sidebar

frontend_club_selector_4_clubs.evidence: Dropdown shows all 4 clubs: Transform Versoix, Grand Saconnex, Servette, Lausanne

frontend_super_admin_badge.evidence: Super Admin badge visible in sidebar for super_admin user

frontend_meta_sync_button.evidence: Sync Meta Ads button visible and functional
